g.text: Fall in quiet at the back and go uncount...
Argue your place aloud with the trial-ma...
Stand down and let the wardens hold you.
Stand the form and answer plain when nam...
Push to the head of the line to climb fi...
Vault the inner barrier to skip the coun...
Strike back at the warden who shoves you...
Hang back at the edge until the count en...
Chance it and slip the count unseen.
Scrabble the loose flue and haul over ha...
Free-climb the overhang line for speed.
Freeze on the holds and call to be roped...
Climb the graded line, hold to cut hold.
Take the smooth face direct to save the ...
Swing out under the overhang to pass fas...
Lunge for a high crack above the graded ...
Rest spread on the face to gather your n...
Chimney the smooth corner with braced le...
Chance the crumbling flue to the side.
Traverse the outer ledge past the post.
Demand the seal as your right, loudly.
Kneel at the wicket and yield to the war...
Report in proper form and receive the cr...
Slip past the wicket without reporting.
Give a false name to shortcut the report...
Snatch the seal from the warden's hand.
Batter the iron wicket open and climb th...
Chance the ledge around the barred wicke...
Throw yourself through on the closing be...
Sprint it and beat the falling grid.
Step back and let the warden bar you out...
Cross clean on the up-beat, all the way ...
Dash under as the grid begins to fall.
Stop halfway to judge the ratchet's timi...
Wedge the ratchet to hold the grid up.
Wait for a later, slower beat to cross.
Climb the grid itself as it rises.
Chance the last of the up-beat and go no...
Thrash the flared slot and beach on the ...
Bridge-jump the last of the cleft to the...
Wedge fast and shout for a rope from abo...
Bridge the chimney steady, testing each ...
Face-climb one wall to move up quicker.
Trust a jammed block for a high pull.
Stem wide across the full gap at once.
Rest wedged in the cleft to catch your b...
Chimney it fast to be out of the dark so...
Chance the flared exit slot direct.
Dash low between the loosing beats.
Break into the open and run flat out.
Show your hands and stand still to be ta...
Keep to the shadow strip, low and steady...
Cross the open span quickly in the light...
Rush the gallery all at once, head down.
Taunt the wardens to waste their bolts.
Wait in a niche for the wardens to stand...
Climb above the slits to pass over them.
Chance a fast low dash between two volle...
Weave the marks fast on a read of the li...
Sprint the middle and outrun the drops.
Halt on a mark and call up your surrende...
Step mark to mark, clear of every hole.
Run the passage straight down the middle...
Shelter directly under a hole to think.
Feel forward blind along the wall.
Pause on a safe-mark to wait out a drop.
Charge through fast before they can aim.
Chance a fast weave between two holes.
Skirt the ledge around the landing unsee...
Argue the oath does not bind you here.
Sit down beside the hurt climber and giv...
Bear the hurt climber clear before you g...
Step over the hurt climber and press on ...
Use the wounded climber as a foothold up...
Shove a waiting rival off the landing ed...
Wait for another climber to clear the wa...
Chance the narrow ledge around the whole...
Scramble the inner turns on failing legs...
Run the outer edge flat out to the top.
Freeze against the wall and wait to be b...
Climb the outer edge, a hand to the wall...
Cut the inner edge to climb the short wa...
Take the slick turns at a run.
Lean out over the core to see the way up...
Sit on a tread to rest your burning legs...
Vault two treads at a time to gain heigh...
Chance a fast scramble up the inner turn...
Your reserve holds; you top out.
Your arms are spent; the reach fails.
Fight up the greasy corner on nerve alon...
Throw for the top and commit everything.
Down-climb and call the pitch beyond you...
Climb the clean line of reaches, arm ove...
Fling for a far hold off the clean line.
Rest hanging on your arms mid-pitch.
Swing on a loose flake to shortcut the c...
Batter your way straight up the overhang...
Climb the flue above the lintel and drop...
Pry the lock with a spike to force the b...
Set your back to the gate and wait to be...
Press the crown-seal to the lock and pas...
Work the old service hatch by hand and s...
Climb the bare wall around the sealed ga...
Batter the iron gate off its seatings.
Wait at the gate for someone to open it.
Chance the crumbling flue above the lint...
Dash the causeway low on a falling gust.
Run the causeway upright to beat the nex...
Drop flat and signal the wardens to fetc...
Cross the causeway low, straight, and st...
Step wide to skirt the streaming fire.
Stand tall to steady yourself against th...
Shelter against the hot fire-cage from t...
Wait for the wind to drop before crossin...
Crawl the very edge to stay out of the w...
Chance a low dash on a lull in the gale.
You kept every form: stand for the crown...
You kept some faith, not all: stand and ...
You kept the wall but not its faith: sta...
You carried the crown-seal to the summit...
You reached the crown unsealed: take the...
